title: coleus sodalium
intro: Coleus sodalium, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coleus sodalium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Coleus sodalium include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
